title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Building a Crypto Store on GitHub Pages — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: Are you a digital creator stuck in a PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad no-go zone? Perhaps you live in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, where these platforms are blocked. Or maybe you're from Venezuela, where the economy's in shambles. Whatever your reason, building a crypto store on GitHub Pages is the solution. In this post, we'll guide you through every step, from setup to your first sale, all for free, using the Full Stack Bundle, just $79.99 for everything you need to succeed.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

Unlike traditional payment processors that require KYC and restrict certain countries, NOWPayments allows you to accept 300+ coins without any verification, making it the perfect fit for creators in restricted zones. With the Full Stack Bundle, you get a complete store infrastructure that integrates seamlessly with GitHub Pages, giving you a robust and scalable solution that's easy to set up and manage.
What You Need Before You Start

To begin, you'll need a GitHub account, a domain (which you can get for free from GitHub Pages), and a wallet (which we'll cover in the payment section). Don't worry, this setup process is straightforward, and we'll walk you through each step. Make sure you have the Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all for just $79.99. This is the key to unlocking your crypto store's potential.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

In this section, we'll configure your payment pipeline using NOWPayments, which integrates seamlessly with the Core Shop Engine. You'll need to create a NOWPayments account, set up a wallet, and generate a payment QR code. Don't worry, this is a simple process that we'll guide you through. With the Web3 Wallet Connect, you'll be able to connect to multiple wallets and coins, giving your customers a wide range of payment options.
The Full Stack Bundle is the only solution that integrates seamlessly with GitHub Pages and allows you to accept 300+ coins without any verification.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

With your payment and delivery pipeline set up, it's time to go live. In this section, we'll walk you through the process of deploying your store to GitHub Pages and setting up the Admin Dashboard to manage your transactions. This is where the magic happens, and you'll start receiving payments from your customers. Make sure to test everything thoroughly before going live to avoid any issues.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once you've made your first sale, it's time to scale your store. In this section, we'll cover how to optimize your store's performance, handle increased traffic, and manage your growth. With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll have everything you need to succeed, including priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide. This is where you'll take your store to the next level and start making real money.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

The correct setup sequence matters because each component depends on the previous one being configured correctly. Start with NOWPayments: create your account, add your wallet addresses for each coin you want to accept, and generate your API key. Then deploy the Core Shop Engine: upload your product files, configure your NOWPayments API credentials, set your product prices in USD, and deploy to your hosting environment. Then configure Web3 Wallet Connect: connect it to your Core Shop Engine endpoint, set up your product display, and test the checkout flow in a browser. Finally, complete a real mainnet test transaction with a small amount of actual crypto. Confirm the webhook fires, the engine processes it, the delivery email arrives, and the download link works. Only after that test passes should you start driving traffic to your store.
With the Web3 Wallet Connect, you'll be able to connect to multiple wallets and coins, giving your customers a wide range of payment options.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a cheap way to set up a digital product store, look no further than the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to succeed, all for just $79.99. With this bundle, you can host your digital store on GitHub Pages for free, and start accepting crypto payments from customers all over the world. Check out the Full Stack Bundle at unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

Here's a step-by-step checklist to get your crypto store up and running: Create a GitHub account and set up a domain; Install the Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard; Configure your payment pipeline using NOWPayments; Deploy your store to GitHub Pages and set up the Admin Dashboard; Test everything thoroughly before going live; Optimize your store's performance and handle increased traffic once you've made your first sale.
The Admin Dashboard is the key to managing your transactions and optimizing your store's performance once you've made your first sale.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
